title: E2W startup E3 Electric.Ai raises Rs 100 crore in equity, debt
snippet: The funding comprises Rs 75 crore in equity and Rs 25 crore in debt, and more than 80% of the capital has already been disbursed, founder and chief executive P Sanjeev told ET. The company plans to use the proceeds for product engineering and commercialisation of its first scooter.
